tags.not:name: Thelonius Monk Circle

tags.name: Freedom Place South
tags.not:name: Thelonious Monk Circle;Thelonius Monk Circle
tags.note: Thelonious Monk Circle is the segment of West 63rd St extending east to a cul de sac. This block has been incorrectly labeled by that name, possibly due to incorrect naming of the CitiBike station at the corner of West 64th St and Freedom Pl S.
